top_signals.title: Kretinsky Is Said to Consider Becoming Top West Ham Shareholder
top_signals.summary: Billionaire Daniel Kretinsky is considering a deal to become the largest shareholder in the London football team West Ham United, according to people familiar with the situation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US and Iranian attacks dent ceasefire, Iranian sources say talks intensify - Reuters
top_signals.summary: US and Iranian attacks dent ceasefire, Iranian sources say talks intensify  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: KPMG’s Summer Friday half-day rollback signals deeper woes for Big Four giants
top_signals.summary: Big Four giant KPMG’s removal of its Friday early finish for employees is affecting branding and souring the mood among staff, who may see this as a signal to reconsider a career at the firm.  Time spent working at a Big Four giant was once a prized bauble to list on a CV. But with [...]

top_signals.title: Royal Caribbean Welcomes Legend of the Seas
top_signals.summary: Royal Caribbean has officially welcomed Legend of the Seas. After nearly two years of construction at the Meyer Turku shipyard in Turku, Finland, the third Icon Class ship is now ready to make its July 2026 European debut.To mark the milestone…
